_comment: Merge ONE of the blocks below into <repo>/.claude/settings.json -> hooks. SessionStart is the portable default; WorktreeCreate is cleaner if your team uses `claude --worktree`.

_choice_a_session_start._when: Default. Works with manual `git worktree add`, IDE worktree creation, any agent CLI (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini). Runs after TUI renders so output mixes with banner — that's fine for setup logs.

_choice_b_worktree_create._when: Team uses `claude --worktree <name>` to create worktrees. Runs BEFORE the TUI so output is clean. STRICT contract: stdout must contain ONLY the absolute worktree path; everything else goes to /dev/tty or stderr. The script template handles this when invoked by Claude (it detects the WorktreeCreate JSON on stdin).

_choice_c_belt_and_suspenders._when: Use both: WorktreeCreate for `claude --worktree`, SessionStart as fallback for everything else. The script's idempotent `link_resource` makes the second run a no-op.
